violations.text: Food items were observed stored on the floor in the walk in cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2025
The condensate from the walk in cooler refrigeration unit is leaking on to the floor. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2025
